title: Countries (Svelte)
description: In this demo, we build the same app as the Countries (React) demo, but with Svelte 5 and the ui-svelte module.

files.src/App.svelte:
{#each firstLetters.current as sliceId (sliceId)} {/each}
{#each currentRowIds.current as rowId (rowId)} {/each}
files.src/Filter.svelte: setCurrentSlice(indexesId, indexId, sliceId)} > {label}{rowIds.current.length}
files.src/Country.svelte: (star.current = !star.current)}> {star.current ? STAR : UNSTAR}
